data.title: Global AI Inc. has appointed Scott Clark as Chief Revenue Officer to drive growth and global adoption of AI solutions.
data.description: An experienced technology executive, revenue leader, and author in the field of AI has recently joined Global AI with the aim of enhancing growth and worldwide acceptance of AI solutions and advisory services.

data.title: Management Board of PST Group AB reviewed tender offer by AB HISK to delist shares from AB Nasdaq Vilnius on 22 August 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, the Management Board of PST Group AB reviewed a tender offer from AB "HISK" to delist shares of PST Group AB from trading on AB Nasdaq Vilnius. After examining the details of the offer, the Management Board presented their opinion on the matter.

data.title: China's stablecoin won't enter mainland circulation.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that unemployment rates have dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The latest data also shows that the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and beating last month's numbers by 50,000. Additionally, wages have increased by 3.5% compared to last year. These positive economic indicators have sparked optimism among both investors and consumers.
Iran and European Foreign Ministers Decide to Hold More Discussions on August 26

data.title: Boeing Co.'s offer rejected by 3,200 machinists seeking bigger gains in a strike standoff. Package included 20% wage increase and $5,000 bonus.
data.description: Boeing Co.'s defense operations in Missouri and Illinois are at a standstill due to a strike by 3,200 machinists demanding better pay and benefits. Union leaders, accompanied by Democratic congressman Wesley Bell, have shown support for the workers on strike. Boeing stands by its rejected offer, claiming it to be robust, with an average wage growth of 40%. The proposed package included a 20% wage increase, a $5,000 ratification bonus, as well as additional vacation and sick leave. IAM International President Brian Bryant expressed readiness to resume negotiations, although no new talks have been planned. Boeing's St. Louis executive, Dan Gillian, defended the company's stance amid the ongoing strike.
Iran Says UN Security Council Should Decide Whether to Extend Diplomatic Talks

data.title: Bosch introduces new 500 Series dishwasher line with Zone Wash Spray Arm, targeting new consumer groups.
data.description: A leading appliance brand, Bosch, launched their latest line of dishwashers, the 500 Series, in Irvine, California. The new product line showcases advanced technology, featuring the innovative Zone Wash Spray Arm.

data.title: Tractor Supply partners with Molly Yeh to launch women's apparel line, prices range from $19.99 to $59.99.
data.description: Brentwood, Tennessee - Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the U.S., revealed a new women's apparel line in collaboration with renowned cookbook author, Food Network host, and beet farmer, Molly Yeh. Designed to reflect the lifestyle of Tractor Supply customers, the collection includes sturdy and practical clothing in vibrant and adaptable styles. Prices for the items in the collection vary from $19.99 to $59.99, with select pieces available for purchase.

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin whales are moving into Ethereum before Powell's speech; one whale buys $267M ETH. BTC: $642M, ETH: $267M.
data.description: Recently, dormant Bitcoin whales have become active, transferring their holdings into Ethereum as they anticipate better performance from ETH. On-chain data analysis by Lookonchain uncovered a Bitcoin whale, in possession of 100,784 BTC (equivalent to $642 million) for almost seven years, who has resurfaced to sell BTC and purchase 62,914 ETH (valued at $267 million) while also initiating a long position of 135,265 ETH (worth $577 million). Another dormant whale exhibited a similar behavior by moving BTC into Hyperliquid, a wallet which originally received 85,947 BTC ($547 million) and currently maintains six wallets with a combined total of 83,585 BTC (approximately $9.42 billion). These actions coincide with a decrease in the prices of Bitcoin and Ethereum, with traders noticing ETH's relative strength compared to BTC, indicating a potential upward trend. Analysts believe that this trend could signify a promising future for Ethereum.

data.title: GWM opened Brazil Plant in Iracemápolis, São Paulo, boosting annual capacity from 20,000 to 50,000 vehicles with global standards.
data.description: GWM celebrated the grand opening of its Brazil Plant in Iracemápolis, São Paulo, establishing its initial end-to-end manufacturing facility in South America. The plant's production capacity is increasing from 20,000 to 50,000 vehicles yearly, aligning with GWM's strategy of "high-quality globalization." Industry experts view the facility not just as a factory but as a representation of cutting-edge technology and seamless integration with the local community.
Legislator Andrew Garbarino reveals recent stock trades, including involvement in GAP company.

data.title: Stock futures rise ahead of Powell's Jackson Hole speech. Dow +0.30%, S&P 500 +0.21%, Nasdaq 100 +0.12%, Russell 2000 +0.48%. Fed likely to cut rates.
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw a rise following a previous decline, with major benchmark indices showing higher numbers. Investors are anticipating comments on labor market, inflation, and interest rates from Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's speech at the Jackson Hole Economic Policy Symposium. The symposium's theme is "Labor Markets in Transition: Demographics, Productivity, and Macroeconomic Policy." The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.34% and the two-year bond stood at 3.79%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool projects a 71.3% likelihood of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in September. Futures showed positive changes for Dow Jones (0.30%), S&P 500 (0.21%), Nasdaq 100 (0.12%), and Russell 2000 (0.48%). The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF, tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 respectively, rose in premarket trading. On the previous day, most S&P 500 sectors closed negatively except for energy and materials. Walmart Inc. saw a 4.5% drop in shares after mixed second-quarter results, while Coty Inc. shares dipped by 22% post fourth-quarter adjusted EPS miss. Economic data showed U.S. initial jobless claims rose to 235,000 and existing home sales climbed by 2% in July. S&P Global services PMI stood at 55.4, and manufacturing PMI climbed to 53.3. Full story accessible on Benzinga.com.
ADB TO LEAD $2 BILLION UPGRADE OF RAILWAY NETWORK IN PAKISTAN

data.title: GWM opens Brazil plant in São Paulo, producing H6, H9, and POER models, showcasing quality and tech innovation.
data.description: In Iracemápolis, São Paulo, GWM has officially opened its Brazil Plant, marking the company’s inaugural full-process manufacturing center in South America. The facility will focus on producing key models such as the GWM HAVAL H6, GWM HAVAL H9, and GWM POER 2.4T pickup initially. Equipped with cutting-edge assembly lines and advanced automation, this plant emphasizes GWM’s dedication to maintaining high global standards and embracing technological advancements.

data.title: BJ's Wholesale Club memberships reach record high, but sales miss expectations. Q2 earnings per share: $1.14 (beat estimates $1.09). Comparable club sales fell by 0.3% YoY, but rose by 2.3% excluding gasoline. Quarterly sales: $5.38 billion (+3.4% YoY). Shares trading lower.
data.description: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BJ) saw a decline in premarket trading following the release of their second-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.14 for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.09. Comparable club sales dropped by 0.3% year-over-year, primarily due to decreased retail fuel prices. However, excluding gasoline, comparable club sales experienced a 2.3% increase, attributed to a rise in foot traffic. Quarterly sales totaled $5.38 billion, indicating a 3.4% growth compared to the previous year, falling short of market expectations.

data.title: Inspira Technologies gets U.S. Patent for ART500, crucial for $20B market. Novel core tech leads the way.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, announced on August 22, 2025, that they have obtained U.S. Patent approval for their low flow rates extracorporeal oxygenation system and associated methods. This patent covers the foundational technology of the ART500 device, a crucial component in Inspira’s plans to enter the $20 billion advanced respiratory support market. The patent includes 16 unique claims that have been identified as innovative by the authorities.

data.title: Liberty Defense partners with Gold Standard Media LLC to raise investor awareness. Marketing agreement dated Aug 15, 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Massachusetts on August 22, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. (TSXV: SCAN, OTCQB: LDDFF, FSE:E30), a prominent technology company specializing in AI-powered advanced detection solutions for hidden weapons and threats, disclosed a marketing deal made on August 15, 2025, with Gold Standard Media, LLC (“GSM”) and associated entities. This agreement aims to boost investor awareness of Liberty. The agreement's finalization is contingent upon approval from the TSX Venture Exchange.

data.title: El Salvador: 350 female students graduate with Bitcoin Diplomas, part of broader push for crypto literacy.
data.description: Dozens of students in El Salvador completed the Bitcoin Diploma course, part of the government's initiative to educate citizens about cryptocurrency. In a post by the Ministry of Education, it was revealed that 350 female students graduated from the Instituto Nacional General Francisco Morazán after completing the training in Bitcoin. The initiative is led by the National Bitcoin Office, with the education minister, Karla Trigueros, attending the graduation ceremony. The program has now been extended to other institutions in the country with materials adapted to the national context. The Bitcoin Diploma was created by Mi Primer Bitcoin, offering free education materials on Bitcoin, covering topics like the history of money and fiat currencies.
